description.value: You've studied under some of the foremost Hylaxian scholars in the galaxy deep in the Forever Halls, or another center of worship, to gain a greater understanding of the Forever Queen's teachings. You carry the evidence of those studies with you in the form of a religious symbol, relic of your faith, or other meaningful memento. You become trained in Religion. If you would automatically become trained in Religion (from your background or class, for example), you instead become trained in another skill of your choice. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.Student of the Canon] feat.
